Scott H. Saunders

2026

library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(tidy.opts=list(width.cutoff=60),tidy=FALSE, echo = TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.align="center", fig.retina = 2)

theme_figure <- function () {
  theme_classic( ) %+replace%
    theme(
      axis.line = element_line(color = 'black', size = 0.25),
      axis.ticks = element_line(color = 'black', size =0.25),
      axis.text = element_text(color = 'black', size=7),
      axis.title=element_text(color = 'black', size=7),
      strip.text = element_text(color = 'black', size = 7),
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      legend.background = element_blank(),
      legend.title=element_text(color = 'black',size=7),
      legend.text=element_text(color = 'black',size=7),
      legend.text.align=0,
      panel.spacing = unit(0,'cm'),
      plot.margin = margin(t=0.25, b = 0.25, l = 0.25, r = 0.25, unit = 'cm'),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = 'black', size = 7),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = 'black', size = 7),
      plot.caption = element_text(color = 'black', size = 8)
    )
}

theme_set(theme_figure())

Fig. 1C

df_len <- read_csv("../../data/low_throughput/2025_12_09_metX_hisA_oligo_len_eff.csv") %>% 
  mutate(eff = Carb300 / LB) %>% 
  mutate(oligo_len = factor(oligo_len, levels = c('none','74','90','104','120','150')))

df_len
plot_len <- ggplot(df_len, aes(x = oligo_len, y = eff, color = locus)) + stat_summary(geom = 'point') + geom_jitter(shape = 21, width = 0.1, height = 0) +
  geom_path(data = . %>% group_by(locus, oligo_len) %>% summarise(avg_eff = mean(eff)), aes(y = avg_eff, group = locus)) + scale_y_log10()+
  scale_color_manual(values = c('#738FC1', '#D56C55'))+
  labs(x = 'Oligo length (bases)', y = 'Efficiency')+
    guides(color = 'none')

plot_len

Fig. 1D

df_lag <- read_csv("../../data/low_throughput/2025_12_23_lead_lag_eff.csv")

df_lag
plot_lag <- ggplot(df_lag, aes(x = lead_lag_strand, y = eff, color = locus)) + 
  #geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.1, dodge.width = 0.2), shape = 21) + 
  #stat_summary(position = position_dodge(width = 0.2)) + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, shape = 21) + 
  stat_summary() + 
  scale_y_log10(label = scales::label_log()) +
  labs(x = 'locus', y = 'Efficiency') + facet_wrap(~locus, scales = 'free_x')+
  scale_color_manual(values = c('#738FC1', '#D56C55','gray')) +
  guides(color = 'none')

plot_lag

Fig. 1E

df_oligo_amount <- read_csv("../../data/low_throughput/2025_12_23_metX_hisA_oligo_amount.csv") %>% 
  mutate(eff = carb / LB)

df_oligo_amount
plot_oligo_amount <-   ggplot(df_oligo_amount, aes(x = factor(oligo_amount_pmol), y = eff, color = locus)) + geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.1, dodge.width = 0.5), shape = 21) + stat_summary(position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) + scale_y_log10() +
  labs(x = 'Oligo amount (pmol)', y = 'Efficiency')+
    scale_color_manual(values = c('#738FC1', '#D56C55','gray'))+
    guides(color = 'none')

plot_oligo_amount

Fig. 1F

df_pint_amount <- read_csv("../../data/low_throughput/2025_12_23_metX_hisA_pInt_amount.csv")%>% 
  mutate(eff = carb / LB)

df_pint_amount
plot_pint <- ggplot(df_pint_amount, aes(x = plasmid_amount_ng, y = eff, color = locus)) + stat_summary(geom = 'point') + geom_jitter(shape = 21, width = 0.1, height = 0) +
  geom_path(data = . %>% group_by(locus, plasmid_amount_ng) %>% summarise(avg_eff = mean(eff)), aes(y = avg_eff, group = locus)) + scale_y_log10()+
  labs(x = 'Plasmid amount (ng)', y = 'Efficiency')+
    scale_color_manual(values = c('#738FC1', '#D56C55','gray'))+
    guides(color = 'none')

plot_pint

Assemble figure

theme_figure <- function () {
  theme_classic( ) %+replace%
    theme(
      axis.line = element_line(color = 'black', size = 0.25),
      axis.ticks = element_line(color = 'black', size =0.25),
      axis.text = element_text(color = 'black', size=7),
      axis.title=element_text(color = 'black', size=7),
      strip.text = element_text(color = 'black', size = 7),
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      legend.background = element_blank(),
      legend.title=element_text(color = 'black',size=7),
      legend.text=element_text(color = 'black',size=7),
      legend.text.align=0,
      panel.spacing = unit(0,'cm'),
      plot.margin = margin(t=0.25, b = 0.25, l = 0.25, r = 0.25, unit = 'cm'),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = 'black', size = 7),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = 'black', size = 7),
      plot.caption = element_text(color = 'black', size = 8)
    )
}

theme_set(theme_figure())

Mb_label <- function(x){
  #e.g. 2 to 2x
  lab <- paste(x / 1000000, " Mb", sep = '')
}

fig_1 <- plot_grid(plot_len ,plot_lag, plot_oligo_amount, plot_pint, ncol = 4, rel_widths = c(1, 1, 1, 1))

fig_1

#save_plot("2025_12_23_PA_ORBIT_fig_1.pdf", fig_1, base_width = 7.24, base_height = 2)
